backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the INDO KIDZ backend, implementing user profile management, school info CRUD, fee category management, and access control using a mixin-based authorization system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features related to fixing the admin Customize tab visibility in Navbar.tsx, including affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose within the INDO KIDZ school web application.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the INDO KIDZ React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Homepage, Admissions, FeeStructure, Gallery, FeesPayment, ContactUs, AdminPanel), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and renders a shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a shield icon and a back-to-home button for non-admin users attempting to access the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/Admissions: Admin form for editing and saving admissions page content fields (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ, portal link) via query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/Announceme: Admin panel for creating, editing, and deleting school announcements with title, body, and date fields using CRUD query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactEdi: Admin editor for updating school contact and social media information fields, with dirty-state tracking and tooltip help text for each field.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeeCategor: Admin UI for managing fee categories, supporting add, inline edit, and delete operations with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin component for managing the photo gallery, allowing upload (with base64 encoding, 2MB limit) and deletion of photos with preview and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/HomeConten: Admin component for editing the home page hero section, including school name, tagline, address, stats, highlights, and testimonials, with save functionality via mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentRec: Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeCusto: Admin component for customizing site theme by selecting preset or custom primary/accent colors and font, then saving via mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with school branding, social media links, quick navigation links, and a static contact info section including address, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with links, login/logout via Internet Identity, and a conditional admin 'Customize' button shown only to verified admin users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and save a profile; shown only when authenticated and no existing profile is found.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control with a secret token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via React context and DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, admin status, school info, fee categories, gallery photos, home content, announcements, admissions content, and theme settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares custom keyframe animations and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that verifies authentication and admin role before rendering a tabbed interface for managing home content, admissions, fees, gallery, contact, announcements, and theme settings.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Admissions page that fetches and displays school admission content (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ) in styled cards with a hero section, falling back to default content when data is unavailable.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page that displays school contact information fetched from the backend and includes a client-side contact form with simulated submission and toast notification.
frontend/src/pages/FeesPayment.tsx: Fee payment page for INDO KIDZ that renders a form collecting student name, roll number, phone, fee category, and payment mode, then shows a success confirmation screen after simulated submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeeStructure.tsx: Fee structure page that fetches and displays fee categories as color-coded cards in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Photo gallery page that fetches and displays school photos in a masonry grid with hover captions and a lightbox modal for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: Main homepage for INDO KIDZ featuring a hero section with stats, school highlights, fee categories, announcements, and testimonials, with fallback default data if API data is unavailable.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the INDO KIDZ UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the INDO KIDZ website version, known issues (Customize tab not appearing after admin login), and existing feature fix requests related to admin navigation visibility.
